title: dalbergia cearensis
intro: Dalbergia cearensis, also known as Pau Brasil, is a tropical tree native to the Atlantic Forest of Brazil. The medicinal properties of Dalbergia cearensis are attributed to its flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia cearensis, such as infusions and extracts, are used to treat conditions like respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal disorders.
